name: oh-my-zz
description: A focused engineering skill pack for idea refinement, reviewed specification-and-plan bundles, brief change plans, design interrogation, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, opt-in project-memory discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.
author: laze44

interface.shortDescription: Ten focused workflows for ideas, plans, reviews, project memory, and simplification.
interface.longDescription: A ten-skill engineering workflow pack for refining ideas, creating reviewed specification-and-plan bundles, planning brief changes, interrogating designs, handing off sessions, reviewing and repairing completed implementations, maintaining project memory, reviewing merge readiness, and simplifying code.
